title: rubus dissociatus
intro: Rubus dissociatus, also known as the Himalayan raspberry or Himalayan dewberry, is a species of raspberry native to the Himalayas and other mountainous regions of Asia. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant compounds that help protect against cell damage. The health benefits of Rubus dissociatus include its ability to support cardiovascular health, reduce stress and anxiety, and boost the immune system. Rubus dissociatus is typically prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is also used in herbal supplements and topical creams.
